title: Warm Wholesome Greek Chicken Tagine
description: A peppery, juicy, romantic Greek dish featuring sesame butter and cooked in a ti-leaf wrap, paleo-friendly and comforting.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a heavy bottomed pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Sprinkle in oregano, mint, smoked paprika, and cumin, and sauté for 30 seconds.
Add the chicken thighs, brown each side until golden, about 8 minutes total.
Pour in lemon juice and tomato puree, stir to coat the chicken and vegetables.
Reduce heat to low, cover with a ti-leaf wrap, and simmer for 30 minutes, turning occasionally.
After simmering, remove the ti-leaf, stir in the sesame butter until melted and glossy.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
